name: BoltXYList
summary: The BoltXYList class defines a bolt group with an XY list shape. The bolt group is the most generic one of the bolt groups.

constructors.name: BoltXYList
constructors.summary: Creates a new bolt XY list instance.

methods.name: AddBoltDistX
methods.summary: Adds an X distance to the bolt XY list.

params.name: DistX
params.doc: The X distance to be added.

returns.doc: True if the distance was added. Throws an OverflowException if there was no more space for the distance.

methods.name: AddBoltDistY
methods.summary: Adds a Y distance to the bolt XY list.

params.name: DistY
params.doc: The Y distance to be added.

returns.doc: True if the distance was added. Throws an OverflowException if there was no more space for the distance.

methods.name: AddOtherPartToBolt
methods.summary: Adds the given part to the list of the other parts that should be bolted.

params.name: M
params.doc: The part to add.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares Identifiers of model objects.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the bolt XY list instance with the given ID from the model database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

params.name: other
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: true if object Identifiers are the same, false otherwise,

methods.name: GetAllReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetAllReportProperties(ArrayList stringNames, ArrayList doubleNames, ArrayList integerNames, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: stringNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the string properties.

params.name: doubleNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the double properties.

params.name: integerNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the integer properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table list that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetAllUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetBoltDistX
methods.summary: Returns the X distance defined by the argument.

params.name: Index
params.doc: The index to the distance list.

returns.doc: The distance defined by the argument.

methods.name: GetBoltDistXCount
methods.summary: Returns the amount of X distances in the bolt XY list.

returns.doc: The amount of X distances.

methods.name: GetBoltDistY
methods.summary: Returns the Y distance defined by the argument.

params.name: Index
params.doc: The index to the distance list.

returns.doc: The distance defined by the argument.

methods.name: GetBoltDistYCount
methods.summary: Returns the amount of Y distances in the bolt XY list.

returns.doc: The amount of Y distances.

methods.name: GetChildren
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the children model objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns the coordinate system for the given model object.

returns.doc: The coordinate system for the given model object.

methods.name: GetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Gets custom object type name from an existing object.

returns.doc: Type name string, empty string if type is not set.

methods.name: GetDoubleReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleReportProperties(ArrayList names, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple double report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

params.name: names
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all double properties for the model object.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool GetDynamicStringProperty(string name, ref string value)
methods.summary: Gets a dynamic string property from the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: GetFatherComponent
methods.summary: Returns the father component of the model object.

returns.doc: A base component on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetFatherPour
methods.summary: Returns the pour that the bolt group is associated to.

returns.doc: The pour object.

methods.name: GetFatherPourUnit
methods.summary: Returns the pour unit that the bolt group is associated to.

returns.doc: A pour unit.

methods.name: GetHierarchicObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected hierarchic objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetIntegerReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetIntegerReportProperties(ArrayList names, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple integer report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

params.name: names
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetIntegerUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all integer properties for the model object.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetOtherPartsToBolt
methods.summary: Returns an array list containing all the other parts that are bolted.

returns.doc: An array list of parts containing all the other parts that are bolted.

methods.name: GetPhase
methods.summary: Retrieves the phase of the model object (the phase number, the phase name, the phase comment and whether the phase is the current one or not).

params.name: phase
params.doc: The returned phase.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetReportProperty(string name, ref double value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property of the report for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be retrieved.

params.name: value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

methods.name: GetReportProperty(String, String.)

methods.summary: Retrieves a string property of the report for the model object.

params.name: name

params.name: value
params.doc: The return value.

returns.doc: True if the value was returned successfully.

methods.name: GetSolid.
methods.summary: Method for getting the solid information of the bolt group.

returns.doc: The solid instance of the bolt group.

methods.name: GetSolid(Boolean)
methods.summary: Method for getting the solid information of the bolt group.

params.name: withHighAccuracy
params.doc: Boolean value which defines if the solid is created with high accuracy

returns.doc: The solid instance of the bolt group.

methods.signature: public bool GetStringReportProperties(ArrayList names, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple string report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

params.name: names
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

methods.summary: Retrieves all string properties for the model object.

params.name: values

methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string name, ref double value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a double property for the model object.

methods.summary: Retrieves an integer property for the model object.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string name, ref string value)
methods.summary: Retrieves a string property for the model object.

params.name: value

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the bolt XY list into the model database. All the attributes must be set.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the existing bolt XY list in the model database to match the current one. Note, the IDs of Part To Bolt To, Part To Be Bolted and OtherParts cannot be modified.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: RemoveOtherPartToBolt
methods.summary: Removes the given part from the list of the other bolted parts.

params.name: M
params.doc: The part to remove.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects a bolt XY list from the model database. The ID must be set.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Sets a custom object type name for an existing object.

params.name: type
params.doc: The custom obect type name to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool SetDynamicStringProperty(string name, string value)
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

params.name: label
params.doc: The label to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetPhase
methods.summary: Sets the phase of the model object.

params.name: phase
params.doc: The new phase. A phase with this phase's number must exist in the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetUserProperties
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperties(List<string> stringPropertyNames, List<string> stringValues, List<string> doublePropertyNames, List<double> doubleValues, List<string> intPropertyNames, List<int> intValues)
methods.summary: Sets multiple properties for the model object.

params.name: stringPropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the string properties to be set.

params.name: stringValues
params.doc: The new values for the string properties.

params.name: doublePropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the double properties to be set.

params.name: doubleValues
params.doc: The new values for the double properties.

params.name: intPropertyNames
params.doc: The names of the int properties to be set.

params.name: intValues
params.doc: The new values for the int properties.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string name, double value)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string name, int value)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string name, string value)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

properties.name: BlindHoleDepth
properties.summary: Gets or sets the blind hole depth.

properties.name: Bolt
properties.summary: Indicates whether the instance is a bolt or just a hole.

properties.name: BoltHolesAttributes
properties.summary: The bolt holes attributes.

properties.name: BoltPositions
properties.summary: Gets the single bolt positions. All the bolt positions are in the XY-plane defined by the bolt group coordinate system. The given positions are in relation to the transformation plane in which the bolt group was selected.

properties.name: BoltSize
properties.summary: The size of the bolts in the group.

properties.name: BoltStandard
properties.summary: The standard of the bolt group.

properties.name: BoltType
properties.summary: The type of the bolt group.

properties.name: ConnectAssemblies
properties.summary: Defines whether to connect a part or an assembly as a secondary part (false) or as a sub-assembly (true).

properties.name: CutLength
properties.summary: The cut length.

properties.name: EndPointOffset
properties.summary: The end point offset values of the bolt group.

properties.name: ExtraLength
properties.summary: The extra length for the bolts.

properties.name: FirstPosition
properties.summary: The first position point.

properties.name: Hole1
properties.summary: Indicates whether the hole 1 is used.

properties.name: Hole2
properties.summary: Indicates whether the hole 2 is used.

properties.name: Hole3
properties.summary: Indicates whether the hole 3 is used.

properties.name: Hole4
properties.summary: Indicates whether the hole 4 is used.

properties.name: Hole5
properties.summary: Indicates whether the hole 5 is used.

properties.name: HoleType
properties.summary: The special hole type: oversized, slotted, blind or no hole.

properties.name: Identifier
properties.summary: The identifier of the object.

properties.name: IsUpToDate
properties.summary: Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: The length. An extra variable that is only set when the bolt group is made of studs instead of bolts.

properties.name: ModificationTime
properties.summary: Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
properties.remarks: The returned time is time of history revision which the object belongs to. For Sharing it is WriteOut time, for multiuser is save time. If history it not written then this method returns null.

properties.name: Nut1
properties.summary: Indicates whether the nut 1 is used in the assembly.

properties.name: Nut2
properties.summary: Indicates whether the nut 2 is used in the assembly.

properties.name: OtherPartsToBolt
properties.summary: The other parts to be bolted (read-only).

properties.name: PartToBeBolted
properties.summary: The part to be bolted.

properties.name: PartToBoltTo
properties.summary: The part to bolt to.

properties.name: PlainHoleType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the plain hole type.

properties.name: Position
properties.summary: The position attributes.

properties.name: RotateSlots
properties.summary: Gets or sets the rotation of the slots: odd, even or parallel.

properties.name: SecondPosition
properties.summary: The second position point.

properties.name: SlotOffsetX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the slotted hole offset X.

properties.name: SlotOffsetY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the slotted hole offset Y.

properties.name: SlottedHoleX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X allowance of the slotted hole.

properties.name: SlottedHoleY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y allowance of the slotted hole.

properties.name: StartPointOffset
properties.summary: The start point offset values of the bolt group.

properties.name: ThreadInMaterial
properties.summary: Whether the thread goes inside the materal or not.

properties.name: Tolerance
properties.summary: The hole tolerance.

properties.name: Washer1
properties.summary: Indicates whether the washer 1 is used in the assembly.

properties.name: Washer2
properties.summary: Indicates whether the washer 2 is used in the assembly.

properties.name: Washer3
properties.summary: Indicates whether the washer 3 is used in the assembly.
